description: Tracked layout contract for ignored local-lab/rebuild-godot retail preview assets. Payloads must never be committed.
notes: Smoke mode always keeps procedural synthetics so goldens and color anchors stay valid.
FBX from AYA export should be converted to GLB/GLTF or OBJ before runtime load.
Core movement remains the deterministic InteractiveSession adapter; presentation follows snapshots only.
